title: Hardcore+
description:
Hardcore+(aka H+) improves vanilla difficulty. 

Adds new mobs and updates the behavior of existing ones. Improves bosses

Also block a LAN preset in hardcore and provide legacy, as Notch willed, TRUE hardcore death.
body:
![fo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8457cf2b01e18302ef61da3256328bfb4b94ad14.png) ![neo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d6378864df2d8f2699289ec7f439e26b5c8db60.png)
![i](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0de18375553419eff9ce315dccceb885971010.png) ![pull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702dd4310f1da518cfe1eb65953281f022b75e05.png) ## Features⭐: Most content can be customized using config.
The enhancement for hardcore mode cannot be disabled. So, this mod can be considered a guarantee that survival in the hardcore world was passed honestly. **Hardcore improve (Only in Hardcore mode)**: - LAN preset cannot be edit. GameMode = Survival, Cheats = off. - Death screen now contains only specatate and delete buttons ### New Mobs 🧟: - Putrid(Jungle zombie) - Martyr(Frosted zombie) - Polygonum(Jungle skeleton) - Bony Sandstone(Desert skeleton) ### Mob AI improvements 🧠: - Pillagers retreat from target on reload - Zombies attack and heal from animals - Skeleton use poisonous and harming arrows after 5 default shoots - Spiders/Cave spiders get a baby variant - Spiders/Cave spiders spawns babies ### Depths:
The number in the config called `Depth start Y` means the Y coordinate from which the mobs will get the boost.
Boost - All monsters(Except values of `end/nether_mobs` tags) get armor and follow range boost(+1 point, +15 blocks) - Skeletons get armor boost(+1 points, +2 points if hold sword) - Zombies get health boost(+2,5 hearts) - Arthropods get damage boost(+1 heart)
Player Available in 1.1.0
### Common Boost: - Piglin health +2,5 hearts, Drowned follow range +5 blocks - Blaze armor +1 and health + 2,5 **Available translations🌐:** * ru_ru(Mr.Toad) * en_us(Mr.Toad)
Want to add localization? Welcome to github-pulll requests
